careers.title: Trajectory & GNC Engineer
careers.program: Atlas 脙垄脗聙脗聰 Launch Systems
careers.description: Model ascent trajectories, stage separation events, and closed-loop guidance logic for the Atlas launch vehicle. Experience with orbital mechanics software (GMAT, STK, or equivalent) preferred.

careers.title: Deep Space Mission Analyst
careers.program: Horizon 脙垄脗聙脗聰 Deep Space Research
careers.description: Research and document interplanetary mission concepts. Analyze transit windows, delta-v budgets, and life support requirements. Strong academic background in aerospace or physics preferred.

careers.title: Structural Systems Engineer
careers.program: Titan 脙垄脗聙脗聰 Orbital Infrastructure
careers.description: Design habitat module structural elements, load path analysis, and docking interface geometry for the Titan orbital station concept. FEA experience a plus.

careers.title: Propulsion Simulation Engineer
careers.program: Ares 脙垄脗聙脗聰 Propulsion Engineering
careers.description: Develop and validate simulation models for Ares thruster concepts. Work alongside hardware leads to ensure simulation fidelity matches bench test results.

careers.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
careers.program: Nova 脙垄脗聙脗聰 Satellite Systems
careers.description: Develop onboard software for the Nova CubeSat platform. Implement ADCS control loops, telemetry pipelines, and fault detection routines on a resource-constrained embedded target.

careers.title: Community & Operations Lead
careers.program: ISA 脙垄脗聙脗聰 Operations
careers.description: Coordinate community events, manage Discord server health, and act as bridge between engineering teams and the broader ISA membership. Strong communication skills required.
